nonBlockingIssues.description: fetch_remote_spikes regression tests are parsing-focused and lighter on end-to-end HTTP fixture coverage.
notifications/initialized response path is conditionally asserted in integration test, which can reduce diagnostics if that step fails intermittently.

appliedUpdates.description: Expanded .factory/library/architecture.md with MCP HTTP session continuity details: propagate Mcp-Session-Id across requests and prefer reqwest bytes() decoding for SSE-style MCP test responses.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align worker-cli skill procedure wording with practical execution and validation reporting expectations (tests-first/build-step guidance versus acceptable implementation order) to reduce false adherence mismatches in scrutiny.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of mcp-scrutiny-fixes observed transcript/skill tension on step ordering and explicit build-step expectations despite successful validation outcomes.
